55 Days: Taking a Perp DEX from Zero to One

During Close Alpha, we leveraged scarcity to onboard trading communities, deployed a T1 KOL blitz to ignite mindshare, and built a multi-layered narrative to lock in market attention — pushing Nado to DeFiLlama Perp DEX #11.

Close Alpha: 2025.11.20 — 2026.01.15 (55 Days)
Section 01

Client Overview

Nado is a perpetual futures DEX built on Ink Chain (Kraken's OP Stack L2), featuring a CLOB (Central Limit Order Book) architecture with 5-15ms matching latency and unified cross-margin. As the core trading engine of the Ink ecosystem, Nado handles 100% of on-chain perpetual volume on the network.

Section 02

Challenges

01

Cold Start on a New Chain

Ink Chain, Kraken's newly launched L2, had a nascent ecosystem. Nado faced a classic cold-start problem during Close Alpha — zero users, zero liquidity, everything from scratch.

02

Hyper-Competitive Perp DEX Landscape

Hyperliquid dominated 80%+ of perp DEX mindshare, with dYdX, GMX, and other incumbents entrenched. Breaking through as a new protocol was near-impossible.

03

Invite-Only Alpha Limits Organic Growth

The closed Alpha required invite codes, blocking conventional acquisition channels. Every onboarded user had to be surgically targeted — high-frequency traders who would generate real volume.

04

No Market Narrative

Nado's tech stack was strong (5-15ms matching) but completely unknown. Without a compelling narrative, even superior architecture couldn't cut through the noise.

Metric Pre-Alpha Baseline (Nov 2025)
Nado Alpha Total Volume$0
TVL~$1M
Active Traders0
CT MindshareNear zero
Section 03

Strategy Overview

Scarcity-driven precision onboarding → KOL blitz to establish mindshare → Multi-dimensional narrative to lock in market conviction. A three-phase progressive growth strategy.
Phase 1 · Nov 2025
Cold Start: Trading Community Onboarding
Leveraged the scarcity of Close Alpha invite codes to surgically onboard high-frequency trading communities, rapidly establishing baseline volume and liquidity.
Phase 2 · Early Dec 2025
Amplification: T1 KOL Precision Distribution
Orchestrated a coordinated push from top Chinese CT KOLs, centering content around authentic trading experiences rather than paid shills.
Phase 3 · Late Dec 2025 — Jan 2026
Ignition: Multi-Dimensional Narrative
Constructed a three-pronged narrative: tech differentiation (CLOB + low latency) × Kraken backing (trust + resources) × airdrop expectations (catalyzed by Lighter's Dec 30 TGE wealth effect). KOLs rode the momentum to push Nado's airdrop narrative to peak conviction.
Mango Methodology

6-Step Narrative Building System

From identifying market whitespace to setting narrative anchors, we systematically built a three-dimensional narrative matrix: tech differentiation (CLOB + low latency), Kraken institutional backing, and airdrop expectations (catalyzed by Lighter's wealth effect). Distributed through a KOL content matrix for maximum narrative penetration.

Mango Methodology

Scarcity-Driven Growth Mechanism

By gating access through invite-only Alpha, we turned limited slots into social currency — driving high-value users to actively compete for entry and organically amplify the protocol, achieving zero-budget cold start.

Section 04

Execution Highlights

Highlight 01

Targeted Trading Community Onboarding

Problem

Under an invite-only Alpha, how do you rapidly acquire high-frequency traders to bootstrap meaningful volume?

Approach
  • Identified and engaged high-frequency trading communities, using scarce Alpha slots as the hook
  • Provided tailored onboarding support to minimize migration friction
  • Deployed points-based incentives to retain early traders
11
Trading Communities

Early Alpha Users
Highlight 02

T1 KOL Precision Distribution

Problem

How do you carve out mindshare for Nado in a perp DEX landscape dominated by Hyperliquid?

Approach
  • Curated a matrix of top Chinese CT KOLs spanning trading, airdrop hunting, and DeFi verticals
  • Content anchored in authentic trading experiences — no paid shills
  • Dec 5-9 five-day Timeline Takeover blitz — every Chinese CT trader opening X saw Nado

Reached 388K followers, generating 119K+ engagement impressions — building massive mindshare for Nado across Chinese CT and attracting real, high-quality traders into Close Alpha.

Highlight 03

Multi-Dimensional Narrative: Tech × Kraken Backing × Airdrop Expectations

Problem

How do you shift market perception from "never heard of Nado" to "can't afford to miss Nado"?

Approach
  • Tech narrative: CLOB architecture + 5-15ms matching — a CEX-grade experience, fully on-chain
  • Backing narrative: The sole Perp DEX on Kraken's Ink Chain — institutional trust and ecosystem resources
  • Airdrop narrative: Lighter's Dec 30 TGE created a wealth effect across the perp DEX vertical. As Ink's core protocol, Nado's airdrop expectations surged — KOLs amplified the momentum
